message:
feat(fr-runtime,fr-conformance): implement CONFIG GET/SET command subsystem

Add full CONFIG command handling with GET/SET/RESETSTAT/REWRITE
subcommands. Support requirepass bridging to the ACL default user with
session-preserving policy (CONFIG SET requirepass does not drop the
current authenticated session, matching Redis behavior). Implement
acllog-max-len configuration parameter with glob-style pattern matching
for CONFIG GET. Add conformance fixture steps for CONFIG SET/GET
requirepass and acllog-max-len, plus differential and unit tests
validating bridge semantics and round-trip stability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
